settings.heading: Bigger carts,
settings.subheading: Tierly adds automatic quantity breaks and tiered discounts right at checkout — no codes, no theme edits. Set a tier, and watch your average order value climb.
settings.trust: No code needed · Works on every theme · Live in minutes

settings.stat_1_label: Nothing to touch in your theme

settings.question: Will it slow down my store?
settings.answer: No. Tierly applies discounts at the checkout layer, so there's no heavy script on your storefront. Your Core Web Vitals stay clean.

settings.question: Do I need a developer?
settings.answer: No. Everything is set from Tierly's admin — pick quantities and discounts, choose what they apply to, and publish. Nothing to touch in your theme.

settings.question: Does it work with my theme?
settings.answer: Yes. Because the discount runs at checkout, Tierly works on any Shopify theme, out of the box — including custom ones.

settings.question: What if I cancel?
settings.answer: Your discounts simply stop applying. There's nothing left behind in your theme to clean up, since Tierly never edited it.

settings.question: Which discount types are supported?
settings.answer: Quantity breaks, tiered percentages, bundle pricing, and cart-value goals — targeted at all products, specific products, or whole collections.
